headline: Software Engineer | Secure Full-Stack Applications & Production Systems
summary: Built and launched Bunkerify, a cybersecurity assessment platform aligned to the ACSC Essential Eight, then extended that product focus into secure full-stack web and mobile engineering. Graduate Software Engineer with a Bachelor of Computer Science (Software Engineering and Cybersecurity), building applications with JavaScript/TypeScript, React/React Native, SQL/NoSQL, and REST APIs. Delivered production-style systems including an AI-assisted resume tailoring platform and an incident management console, with strong focus on system integrity and maintainability.

education.details: Major in Software Engineering and Cybersecurity

bullets.text: Designed and developed a full-stack AI-assisted resume tailoring platform that generates structured HTML and PDF outputs from job descriptions.
Implemented OpenAI API integration with strict no-fabrication validation logic to enforce factual consistency and prevent unsupported claims.
Built a responsive UI with real-time preview, export actions, and validation feedback to improve usability and output reliability.
Deployed the application with VPN-only access (Tailscale) on a cloud VM to restrict public exposure and protect user data.
Developed a web-based incident management console simulating production support workflows end-to-end.
Implemented structured incident lifecycle tracking with severity classification, status transitions, ownership, and event timelines.
Added SLA-aware monitoring with breach indicators to support prioritisation and response quality.
Included runbook and root-cause analysis capture to improve incident resolution consistency and documentation quality.
Built a cybersecurity assessment platform aligned to the ACSC Essential Eight maturity model.
Designed a 19-question structured assessment with automated scoring and category-level risk breakdowns.
Automated HTML report delivery using SendGrid transactional email for consistent user feedback and follow-up.
Integrated lead capture and booking workflow (Calendly) to convert assessments into consultations.
Built a cross-platform mobile application using React Native and TypeScript.
Implemented Firebase integration for authentication, cloud data storage, and messaging workflows.
Added geolocation and media upload capabilities with structured in-app navigation.
Contributed to front-end and back-end feature development for a dynamic web platform.
Implemented responsive UI components and API-driven features to enhance usability and data interaction.
Collaborated with stakeholders to translate functional requirements into maintainable code.
Implemented custom front-end features for an eCommerce website with focus on clean layout and responsiveness.
Supported server-side functionality for product displays, transactional workflows, and content updates.
Enhanced mobile usability and cross-device consistency across the platform.

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate – AWS Academy Cloud Foundations award
